name: text-fade-replace
title: TextFadeReplace
description: Cycles through a list of phrases, crossfading one into the next in place so the swap never shifts the layout. Calm house-eased crossfade for rotating taglines and value props.
pickWhen: phrase rotation where the layout must not shift — fixed-height tagline, rotating hero copy. Use `word-rotate` for rise-and-fade motion.
